variants.title: HiFi Filter SAB 085034 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAB 085034 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAB 085034 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 217.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 87.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 77.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 315.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 280.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AH19003 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAB 085034
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AH19003 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAB 085034
variants.description: With over 1,500 different air filtration products, from clamps to air housings to advanced air filters, Fleetguard® provides peace of mind for your air filtration needs. Our Fleetguard AH19003 air housing is part of the heavy-duty air filtration line, covering your sophisticated air intake system requirements.
